title: Fix for Fix resolving default/nondefault type parameters (#7171)

features.name: nested parameterized class with default type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a type parameter that defaults to another parameterized class instantiation with empty arguments

features.name: implicit vs explicit default type typedef
features.description: Code should include a typedef using implicit default type parameter and another typedef using explicit equivalent default type parameter for the same parameterized class
features.snippet:
typedef Holder#()         H_imp_t;
typedef Holder#(W#(int))  H_exp_t;

features.name: dynamic cast between implicitly and explicitly defaulted parameterized types
features.description: Code should include a $cast between variables of implicitly defaulted and explicitly defaulted parameterized class types that should resolve to the same type
